sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM claims;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM claims;
SELECT CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_STATUS, CLAIM_TYPE FROM claims LIMIT 50;
SELECT CLAIM_STATUS, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY CLAIM_STATUS ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT CLAIM_STATUS, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY CLAIM_STATUS ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED';
SELECT CLAIM_STATUS, DENIAL_REASON, CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_TYPE FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' LIMIT 50;
SELECT BILLED_AMOUNT, PAID_AMOUNT, CLAIM_STATUS, CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_TYPE FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_STATUS = 'PENDING' LIMIT 50;
SELECT SUM(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims;
SELECT AVG(CAST(PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_paid_amount FROM claims;
SELECT KP_REGION, SUM(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT PLAN_TYPE, AVG(CAST(COPAY AS REAL)) as avg_copay FROM claims GROUP BY PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY avg_copay DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT MAX(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as max_billed_amount FROM claims;
SELECT c.FACILITY, SUM(CAST(c.PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_paid_amount FROM claims c JOIN encounters e ON c.ENCOUNTER_ID = e.ENCOUNTER_ID GROUP BY c.FACILITY ORDER BY sum_paid_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT DENIAL_REASON, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY DENIAL_REASON ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT CPT_CODE, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY CPT_CODE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: top 10 CPT codes by claim count
sql: SELECT CPT_CODE, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY CPT_CODE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT FACILITY, SUM(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT SUBSTR(SERVICE_DATE, 1, 7) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY SUBSTR(SERVICE_DATE, 1, 7) ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: average billed amount per claim type
sql: SELECT CLAIM_TYPE, AVG(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_billed_amount FROM claims GROUP BY CLAIM_TYPE ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

q: sum of allowed amount by region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, SUM(CAST(ALLOWED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_allowed_amount FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY sum_allowed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many claims in NCAL region
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM claims WHERE KP_REGION = 'NCAL';
SELECT DENIAL_REASON, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' GROUP BY DENIAL_REASON ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many members do we have
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM members;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM members;
SELECT GENDER, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY GENDER ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, AVG(CAST(RISK_SCORE AS REAL)) as avg_risk_score FROM members GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY avg_risk_score DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT MEMBER_ID, MRN, FIRST_NAME, LAST_NAME, RISK_SCORE FROM members WHERE CAST(RISK_SCORE AS REAL) >= 3.5 LIMIT 50;
SELECT RACE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY RACE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT LANGUAGE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY LANGUAGE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many members enrolled in HMO
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM members WHERE PLAN_TYPE = 'HMO';
SELECT AVG(CAST(RISK_SCORE AS REAL)) as avg_risk_score FROM members;

SELECT m.CHRONIC_CONDITIONS, d.ICD10_DESCRIPTION, d.IS_CHRONIC, m.MEMBER_ID, m.MRN, m.FIRST_NAME, m.LAST_NAME FROM members m JOIN diagnoses d ON m.MEMBER_ID = d.MEMBER_ID WHERE d.IS_CHRONIC = 'Y' LIMIT 50;
SELECT GENDER, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY GENDER ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM encounters;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM encounters;
SELECT VISIT_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY VISIT_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT VISIT_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY VISIT_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY';
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'INPATIENT';
SELECT e.DEPARTMENT, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN providers p ON e.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY e.DEPARTMENT ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT AVG(CAST(LENGTH_OF_STAY AS REAL)) as avg_length_of_stay FROM encounters;

SELECT FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'TELEHEALTH';
SELECT e.ENCOUNTER_STATUS, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN providers p ON e.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY e.ENCOUNTER_STATUS ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT e.DEPARTMENT, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN providers p ON e.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY e.DEPARTMENT ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT DISPOSITION, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY DISPOSITION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM diagnoses;
SELECT ICD10_CODE, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY ICD10_CODE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT SEVERITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY SEVERITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM diagnoses WHERE IS_CHRONIC = 'Y';
SELECT HCC_CATEGORY, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY HCC_CATEGORY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT DIAGNOSIS_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY DIAGNOSIS_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT ICD10_CODE, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY ICD10_CODE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM prescriptions;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM prescriptions;
SELECT MEDICATION_CLASS, COUNT(*) as count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY MEDICATION_CLASS ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT MEDICATION_NAME, COUNT(*) as count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY MEDICATION_NAME ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT AVG(CAST(p.COST AS REAL)) as avg_cost FROM prescriptions p JOIN claims c ON p.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID;
SELECT p.MEDICATION_CLASS, SUM(CAST(p.COST AS REAL)) as sum_cost FROM claims c JOIN prescriptions p ON c.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY p.MEDICATION_CLASS ORDER BY sum_cost DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT PHARMACY, COUNT(*) as count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY PHARMACY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT AVG(CAST(DAYS_SUPPLY AS REAL)) as avg_days_supply FROM prescriptions;
SELECT RX_ID, STATUS, COUNT(*) as count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY RX_ID, STATUS ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM providers;
SELECT SPECIALTY, COUNT(*) as count FROM providers GROUP BY SPECIALTY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM providers GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT DEPARTMENT, COUNT(*) as count FROM providers GROUP BY DEPARTMENT ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT SPECIALTY, AVG(CAST(PANEL_SIZE AS REAL)) as avg_panel_size FROM providers GROUP BY SPECIALTY ORDER BY avg_panel_size DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT p.NPI, m.PCP_NPI, p.PROVIDER_FIRST_NAME, p.PROVIDER_LAST_NAME, m.MEMBER_ID, m.MRN, m.FIRST_NAME, m.LAST_NAME, p.ACCEPTS_NEW_PATIENTS FROM members m JOIN claims claims ON m.MEMBER_ID = claims.MEMBER_ID JOIN providers p ON claims.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI WHERE p.ACCEPTS_NEW_PATIENTS = 'Y' LIMIT 50;
SELECT PROVIDER_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM providers GROUP BY PROVIDER_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM referrals;
SELECT URGENCY, COUNT(*) as count FROM referrals GROUP BY URGENCY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT REFERRAL_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM referrals GROUP BY REFERRAL_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT r.SPECIALTY, COUNT(*) as count FROM referrals r JOIN providers p ON r.REFERRING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY r.SPECIALTY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT REFERRAL_ID, STATUS, COUNT(*) as count FROM referrals GROUP BY REFERRAL_ID, STATUS ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT REFERRAL_REASON, COUNT(*) as count FROM referrals GROUP BY REFERRAL_REASON ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT c.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN members m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY c.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT c.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN members m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY c.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, SUM(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, AVG(CAST(c.PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_paid_amount FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY avg_paid_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT c.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN members m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' GROUP BY c.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, SUM(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, m.GENDER, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID, m.GENDER ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: total paid amount by member plan type
sql: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, m.PLAN_TYPE, SUM(CAST(c.PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_paid_amount FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID, m.PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY sum_paid_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN encounters e ON m.MEMBER_ID = e.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: which members have most emergency visits
sql: SELECT e.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN members m ON e.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE e.VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY' GROUP BY e.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;

q: average length of stay by member
sql: SELECT e.MEMBER_ID, AVG(CAST(e.LENGTH_OF_STAY AS REAL)) as avg_length_of_stay FROM encounters e JOIN members m ON e.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY e.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY avg_length_of_stay DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'INPATIENT' GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY, COUNT(*) as count FROM providers p JOIN claims c ON p.NPI = c.RENDERING_NPI GROUP BY p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: top 5 providers by total billed amount
sql: SELECT p.NPI, SUM(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.NPI ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 5;

q: average paid amount by provider specialty
sql: SELECT p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY, AVG(CAST(c.PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_paid_amount FROM providers p JOIN claims c ON p.NPI = c.RENDERING_NPI GROUP BY p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY ORDER BY avg_paid_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

q: which provider has most denied claims
sql: SELECT p.NPI, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI WHERE c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' GROUP BY p.NPI ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT p.NPI, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.NPI ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.SPECIALTY, SUM(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM providers p JOIN claims c ON p.NPI = c.RENDERING_NPI GROUP BY p.SPECIALTY ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

q: top diagnosis codes in emergency visits
sql: SELECT d.ICD10_CODE, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses d JOIN encounters e ON d.ENCOUNTER_ID = e.ENCOUNTER_ID WHERE e.VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY' GROUP BY d.ICD10_CODE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT e.VISIT_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses d JOIN encounters e ON d.ENCOUNTER_ID = e.ENCOUNTER_ID GROUP BY e.VISIT_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.DEPARTMENT, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses d JOIN providers p ON d.DIAGNOSING_NPI = p.NPI WHERE d.IS_CHRONIC = 'Y' GROUP BY p.DEPARTMENT ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN prescriptions p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN prescriptions p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT p.MEMBER_ID, AVG(CAST(p.COST AS REAL)) as avg_cost FROM prescriptions p JOIN members m ON p.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID JOIN claims c ON p.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY p.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY avg_cost DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT p.MEMBER_ID, SUM(CAST(p.COST AS REAL)) as sum_cost FROM prescriptions p JOIN members m ON p.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID JOIN claims c ON p.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY p.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY sum_cost DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT r.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM referrals r JOIN members m ON r.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY r.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM referrals WHERE URGENCY = 'URGENT' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: average billed amount by provider specialty for denied claims
sql: SELECT p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY, AVG(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_billed_amount FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI WHERE c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' GROUP BY p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

q: claims by member gender and region
sql: SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, m.GENDER, m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID, m.GENDER, m.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY, COUNT(*) as count FROM providers p JOIN encounters e ON p.NPI = e.RENDERING_NPI WHERE e.VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY' GROUP BY p.NPI, p.SPECIALTY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT p.SPECIALTY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN providers p ON e.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.SPECIALTY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;

sql: SELECT SUM(CAST(PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_paid_amount FROM claims;

SELECT p.NPI, SUM(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.NPI ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 3;
SELECT FACILITY, SUM(CAST(PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_paid_amount FROM claims GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY sum_paid_amount ASC LIMIT 5;
SELECT ICD10_CODE, COUNT(*) as count FROM diagnoses GROUP BY ICD10_CODE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT MEDICATION_NAME, SUM(CAST(COST AS REAL)) as sum_cost FROM prescriptions GROUP BY MEDICATION_NAME ORDER BY sum_cost DESC LIMIT 10;
SELECT c.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN members m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY c.MEMBER_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 3 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.NPI, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.NPI HAVING COUNT(*) > 10 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY FACILITY HAVING COUNT(*) > 100 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN prescriptions p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID HAVING COUNT(*) > 2 ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: show me the claim count for each region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: can you tell me how many patients we have
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM members;

q: give me the total spend by region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, SUM(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT NPI, PROVIDER_FIRST_NAME, PROVIDER_LAST_NAME FROM providers WHERE SPECIALTY LIKE '%CARDIOLOGY%' LIMIT 50;

q: what does the denial rate look like by facility
sql: SELECT c.FACILITY, COUNT(*) as total_claims, SUM(CASE WHEN c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as denied_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as denial_rate FROM claims c JOIN encounters e ON c.ENCOUNTER_ID = e.ENCOUNTER_ID GROUP BY c.FACILITY ORDER BY denial_rate DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT VISIT_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY VISIT_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how is the cost distributed across regions
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: give me claims count by memeber
sql: SELECT MEMBER_ID, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY MEMBER_ID ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT BILLING_NPI, SUM(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims GROUP BY BILLING_NPI ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 5;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.MEMBER_ID, SUM(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.MEMBER_ID ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT VISIT_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters GROUP BY VISIT_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT MEDICATION_CLASS, COUNT(*) as count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY MEDICATION_CLASS LIMIT 30;
SELECT FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT KP_REGION, AVG(CAST(PAID_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_paid_amount FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_STATUS = 'PAID' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY avg_paid_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_STATUS, CLAIM_TYPE FROM claims LIMIT 50;
SELECT CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_STATUS, CLAIM_TYPE FROM claims LIMIT 50;
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM claims;
SELECT SERVICE_DATE, ADMIT_DATE, DISCHARGE_DATE FROM encounters ORDER BY SERVICE_DATE DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT c.ENCOUNTER_ID, e.VISIT_TYPE, e.ENCOUNTER_STATUS, c.CLAIM_ID, c.CLAIM_STATUS, c.CLAIM_TYPE, c.PAID_AMOUNT FROM claims c JOIN encounters e ON c.ENCOUNTER_ID = e.ENCOUNTER_ID LIMIT 50;
SELECT CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_STATUS, CLAIM_TYPE FROM claims WHERE SERVICE_DATE LIKE '2024%' LIMIT 50;
SELECT ENCOUNTER_ID, VISIT_TYPE, ENCOUNTER_STATUS FROM encounters WHERE SERVICE_DATE LIKE '2025%' LIMIT 50;
SELECT SUBSTR(SERVICE_DATE, 1, 7) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY SUBSTR(SERVICE_DATE, 1, 7) ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT SUBSTR(SERVICE_DATE, 1, 7) as month, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY SUBSTR(SERVICE_DATE, 1, 7) ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as total_claims, SUM(CASE WHEN CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as denied_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as denial_rate FROM claims GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY denial_rate DESC LIMIT 30;

q: average cost per encounter by visit type
sql: SELECT e.VISIT_TYPE, AVG(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_billed_amount FROM encounters e JOIN claims c ON e.ENCOUNTER_ID = c.ENCOUNTER_ID GROUP BY e.VISIT_TYPE ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.NPI, c.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.NPI, c.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN encounters e ON m.MEMBER_ID = e.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY m.PLAN_TYPE LIMIT 30;
SELECT CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_STATUS, CLAIM_TYPE, BILLED_AMOUNT, PAID_AMOUNT FROM claims WHERE CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL) > 10000 LIMIT 50;
SELECT FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'INPATIENT' AND DISPOSITION = 'Admitted' GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: count of foster care members for each region on medicaid
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE DATE_OF_BIRTH >= date('now', '-21 years') AND PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicaid' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many pediatric members are enrolled in each region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE DATE_OF_BIRTH >= date('now', '-18 years') GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: count of senior patients on medicare by region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicare Advantage' AND DATE_OF_BIRTH <= date('now', '-65 years') GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: total claims for elderly members by region
sql: SELECT m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE m.DATE_OF_BIRTH <= date('now', '-65 years') GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many diabetic members by region
sql: SELECT m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE c.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'E11%' GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: total claims for members with hypertension
sql: SELECT COUNT(*) as total_count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE c.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'I10%';

q: average billed amount for asthma claims by region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, AVG(CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_billed_amount FROM claims WHERE ICD10_CODE LIKE 'J45%' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many members with depression by gender
sql: SELECT m.GENDER, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE c.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'F32%' GROUP BY m.GENDER ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT c.FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN encounters e ON c.ENCOUNTER_ID = e.ENCOUNTER_ID WHERE c.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'E66%' GROUP BY c.FACILITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: count of high risk members by plan type
sql: SELECT PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE CAST(RISK_SCORE AS REAL) >= 3.5 GROUP BY PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: comorbid patients by region on medicaid
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicaid' AND CAST(CHRONIC_CONDITIONS AS INTEGER) >= 2 GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: average billed amount for medicare members by region
sql: SELECT m.KP_REGION, AVG(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_billed_amount FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE m.PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicare Advantage' GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

q: denial rate for medicaid members by region
sql: SELECT m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as total_claims, SUM(CASE WHEN c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as denied_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as denial_rate FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE m.PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicaid' GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY denial_rate DESC LIMIT 30;

q: count of emergency visits for medicaid members by facility
sql: SELECT e.FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN members m ON e.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID WHERE m.PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicaid' AND e.VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY' GROUP BY e.FACILITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT e.DEPARTMENT, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN providers p ON e.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI WHERE e.VISIT_TYPE = 'TELEHEALTH' GROUP BY e.DEPARTMENT ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN prescriptions p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID WHERE p.MEDICATION_CLASS = 'Depression' GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many patients on pain medication by plan type
sql: SELECT m.PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN prescriptions p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID WHERE p.MEDICATION_CLASS = 'Pain' GROUP BY m.PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_TYPE = 'INSTITUTIONAL' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: total claims for elderly diabetic patients on medicare by region
sql: SELECT m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE m.PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicare Advantage' AND c.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'E11%' AND m.DATE_OF_BIRTH <= date('now', '-65 years') GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many comorbid patients on medicaid by region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicaid' AND CAST(CHRONIC_CONDITIONS AS INTEGER) >= 2 GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: what is the most prescribed medication
sql: SELECT MEDICATION_NAME, COUNT(*) as count FROM prescriptions GROUP BY MEDICATION_NAME ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;

q: which facilities handle the most emergency cases
sql: SELECT FACILITY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'EMERGENCY' GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;

q: give me a count of members enrolled in each plan
sql: SELECT PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: how many claims were denied for each region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims WHERE CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: show me all the inpatient encounters
sql: SELECT ENCOUNTER_ID, VISIT_TYPE, ENCOUNTER_STATUS, MEMBER_ID, MRN, SERVICE_DATE, ADMIT_DATE FROM encounters WHERE VISIT_TYPE = 'INPATIENT' ORDER BY SERVICE_DATE DESC LIMIT 50;
SELECT CLAIM_STATUS, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims GROUP BY CLAIM_STATUS ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: distribution of members across risk levels
sql: SELECT RISK_SCORE, COUNT(*) as count FROM members GROUP BY RISK_SCORE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.SPECIALTY, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN providers p ON e.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.SPECIALTY ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10;

q: average length of stay by facility
sql: SELECT FACILITY, AVG(CAST(LENGTH_OF_STAY AS REAL)) as avg_length_of_stay FROM encounters GROUP BY FACILITY ORDER BY avg_length_of_stay DESC LIMIT 30;

q: which provider has the most denied claims
sql: SELECT p.NPI, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI WHERE c.CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' GROUP BY p.NPI ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1;

q: prescriptions by medication class and plan type
sql: SELECT p.MEDICATION_CLASS, m.PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM prescriptions p JOIN members m ON p.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY p.MEDICATION_CLASS, m.PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: which region has the highest average risk score
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, AVG(CAST(RISK_SCORE AS REAL)) as avg_risk_score FROM members GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY avg_risk_score DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT BILLED_AMOUNT, PAID_AMOUNT, ALLOWED_AMOUNT, CLAIM_ID, CLAIM_STATUS, CLAIM_TYPE, SERVICE_DATE FROM claims WHERE CAST(BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL) > 10000 ORDER BY SERVICE_DATE DESC LIMIT 50;

q: high risk diabetic members by region
sql: SELECT m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN claims c ON m.MEMBER_ID = c.MEMBER_ID WHERE CAST(m.RISK_SCORE AS REAL) >= 3.5 AND c.ICD10_CODE LIKE 'E11%' GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: foster care members on medicaid by region
sql: SELECT KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members WHERE DATE_OF_BIRTH >= date('now', '-21 years') AND PLAN_TYPE = 'Medicaid' GROUP BY KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT m.KP_REGION, COUNT(*) as count FROM members m JOIN prescriptions p ON m.MEMBER_ID = p.MEMBER_ID WHERE p.MEDICATION_CLASS = 'Depression' GROUP BY m.KP_REGION ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: average billed amount by specialty and region
sql: SELECT p.SPECIALTY, c.KP_REGION, AVG(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as avg_billed_amount FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.SPECIALTY, c.KP_REGION ORDER BY avg_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;

SELECT PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as total_claims, SUM(CASE WHEN CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as denied_count, ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN CLAIM_STATUS = 'DENIED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as denial_rate FROM claims GROUP BY PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY denial_rate DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT c.KP_REGION, m.GENDER, COUNT(*) as count FROM claims c JOIN members m ON c.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY c.KP_REGION, m.GENDER ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;

q: encounters by visit type and plan type
sql: SELECT e.VISIT_TYPE, m.PLAN_TYPE, COUNT(*) as count FROM encounters e JOIN members m ON e.MEMBER_ID = m.MEMBER_ID GROUP BY e.VISIT_TYPE, m.PLAN_TYPE ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30;
SELECT p.NPI, SUM(CAST(c.BILLED_AMOUNT AS REAL)) as sum_billed_amount FROM claims c JOIN providers p ON c.RENDERING_NPI = p.NPI GROUP BY p.NPI ORDER BY sum_billed_amount DESC LIMIT 30;
